commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): persist Claude auth across rebuilds with bind mount and machine-id

Revert from Docker volume to host bind mount for ~/.claude, and restore
project-specific /etc/machine-id generation. Empty machine-id was the
root cause of re-authentication on rebuild.

Closes #8

commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): create .claude.json to prevent auth re-confirmation

Add creation of ~/.claude/.claude.json in postCreateCommand.
Without this file, Claude Code treats the environment as a new
installation and requests re-authentication on every container rebuild.

Refs #8

commit.message:
Add task plan persistence and resume for AI chat sessions

When the AI receives multi-step tasks, it now outputs structured plans
with [[task-plan]] markers. The frontend parses these, tracks progress
in localStorage, and shows a resume banner when an interrupted task is
detected. Clicking "Reprendre" sends the plan state back to the AI so
it can continue from the last incomplete step.

feat(prism-cli): add add_dir tool for multi-directory working context

Agents can now expand their working scope beyond the primary cwd at
runtime. `add_dir` validates the path, deduplicates, injects the
directory list into the system prompt, and returns a listing so the
LLM immediately understands the structure.

Works across all agent entry points: CLI agent, interactive REPL,
ACP/Zed server, and sub-agents spawned via spawn_agent.

Also includes compile_check infrastructure (post-turn validation hook)
and a dev-all Makefile target for running Prism + Zed together.

commit.message:
fix(ScripturePage): 修復桌機滾輪事件被根 div 攔截的問題

根因：CSS 規範規定 overflow-x:hidden 會使瀏覽器自動將 overflow-y 設為 auto，
導致根 div 成為獨立捲動容器，桌機滑鼠滾輪事件被 div 攔截而非 window，
window scroll listener 永遠不觸發，內容無法透過滾輪顯示。

修復：
1. 根 div overflowX 由 'hidden' 改為 'clip'

commit.message:
Fix DB save failure: sanitize Infinity/NaN + retry save

Root cause: profit_factor could be float("inf") when all trades win,
and numpy metrics could be numpy.float64 — both cause PostgreSQL JSONB
serialization to fail silently. DB status stayed "running" forever.

- Add _safe_float() to sanitize inf/nan/numpy types to Python floats
- Replace float("inf") profit factor with 999.99
- Add retry (1 attempt) for DB save with detailed error logging

commit.message:
Use Spotify iFrame API for hidden embed preview playback

Instead of removing embed preview entirely, uses the official Spotify
iFrame API to create a hidden embed and auto-play via controller.togglePlay().
This works for virtually all songs (even those without preview_url) without
any visible popup — audio just plays when you tap album art.

Flow: previewUrl → HTML5 Audio | no previewUrl → hidden Spotify embed via
iFrame API with programmatic play. Tap again to stop.

commit.message:
fix: parse formatted price strings in buyer persona query

rezy_locality_cards stores prices as TEXT like "₹8,300" — arithmetic
on these returned 0, causing NaN in the matching engine. Now strips
currency symbols and commas before numeric conversion. Also replaced
Math.random() with deterministic value for SSR stability.

commit.message:
refactor: improve render performance and cleanup patterns

- Use granular Zustand selectors instead of full-store destructuring
  to prevent re-renders on every SSE streaming chunk
- Throttle auto-scroll (100ms) to avoid layout thrash during streaming
- Extract shared SESSION_SERVICE_URL config constant
- Clear SSE reconnect timer on disconnect to prevent stale reconnects
- Remove redundant `creating` local state in SessionList (use store `loading`)
- Only update activeSession during polling when status actually changes

commit.message:
Oil paint drying physics — real time-based surface memory

Halved drying thresholds (90s wet, 300s tacky, 900s set), visible
sinking-in effect in compositor, tacky stage punishment with muddying
and aggressive pickup, grain-gated scumbling on dry paint, depleted
brush smearing/dragging with additive paint transfer, tacky-aware
scrape and wipe, adaptive compositor update frequency.

commit.message:
Add execution friction models, session-end sweep, and fix Sharpe annualization

- Add spread (fixed/percentage) and market impact (sqrt) models to
  SimulatedExecutionHandler with full friction pipeline for MARKET/STOP fills
- Add session-end sweep for next_open mode to fill deferred MARKET orders
  at session close instead of overnight hold
- Fix Sharpe/Sortino to aggregate equity curve to daily frequency before
  computing returns, preventing inflated ratios at intraday resolutions
- Add 26 tests for friction models and session-end sweep
- Update config, CLI, UI, and docs to support new friction parameters
